title: 100 Pcs Christmas Wooden Ornaments Bauble Natural Unfinished Wood Slice Blank Round Shape with String Wood Craft Wooden Shapes Embellishments for Hanging Xmas Tree Decoration DIY Crafts 8.9cm
features: 【Quality and Natural Wood Slice】-- This Christmas wooden tags made of quality wood, excellent laser cut and polished, smooth, lightweight and durable, eco-friendly, writable and reusable.

【DIY Crafts Round Wood Slice Embellishments】 - These blank wooden bauble offers you the chance to DIY your own Christmas ornaments. Wood ornaments slices are perfect for pyrography and hand painting, even allows for writing or scribbling.
【Large Craft Wood Tag】-- The Wooden christmas tree decorations is 8.9cm/3.5in, 2.5m in thickness, 30cm/11.8inches for each hanging rope.

【Easy to Hanging Craft Wood Disc】-- Every craft wood disc with hole to hang up easily, come with string for each Christmas wooden embellishments. 100 pieces enough quantities for your different needs.

【Wide Applications of Wooden Shapes with Holes】-- Durable Wooden Baubles with hole and string, it's great for hanging decoration for Christmas trees, wedding decoration, house ornaments and making wood gift tag.
description: Product Description TAIANJI 100 pieces round wooden shape with hole allow you have different and individual crafts/decorations Specifications of Wood Slice with Hole Material: wood Size: 8.9cm/3.5inches Thickness: approx. 0.1 inch/ 0.25 cm Package includes: 100 x Round wooden cutouts 100 x Jute Quality Material of Round Wood Tag These wooden heart embellishments are made of premium natural wood, Excellent laser cut and polished, nice wood sanded and dry, smooth and no loose chips Blank Wood Circles Design You are able to color with markers, photo transfer, stickers, glitter/glue gems on these unfinished wood slice or draw, paint, sculptureon on them Making a Memory Perfect for making your own unique homemade ornaments and having great memories with your family and friends Wooden Shapes to Decorate Perfect for Thanksgiving, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Christmas, baby shower, party,ect. Good ideal for paintings, guestbook, embellishments, gift tags, wish cards, table numbers and other craft projects
